surface_verification.justification: Internal security-scanner enhancement (CLI library code) + a config register. No web/api/cli-product/UI/store surface is introduced. The new behavior (_run_trivy passes --ignorefile) is covered by 4 unit tests against a mocked subprocess; the end-to-end Trivy suppression of CVE-2026-54285 is a CI-gated check (trivy is not installed on the local dev box) confirmed in this PR's security.yml run before merge.

degraded: Full monorepo suite delegated to CI ci.yml. Blast radius is isolated to the shipwright-security plugin (oss_backend._run_trivy + tests) and a new repo-root .trivyignore.yaml; other plugins/shared are untouched. Local scoped gate = full shipwright-security suite (424 passed, 3 skipped = real-scanner smoke tests) + ruff clean.

End-to-end accepted-risk suppression (Trivy honoring .trivyignore.yaml for CVE-2026-54285) is verified in the PR's security.yml CI scan, not locally (trivy not on PATH). 'Done' is gated on the CI medium count dropping 1 -> 0.

behaviors.behavior: _run_trivy passes `--ignorefile <target>/.trivyignore.yaml` when an ignore file exists at the scanned target root (target stays last arg)
_run_trivy omits `--ignorefile` when no ignore file is present (backward-compatible; existing skip-dirs + target-last contract unchanged)
behaviors.evidence: test_oss_backend_ignorefile.py::test_trivy_cmd_omits_ignorefile_when_absent PASSED; existing test_oss_backend.py::test_trivy_cmd_passes_each_default_as_skip_dirs unchanged + still PASSED (full security suite 424 passed)

behaviors.behavior: _resolve_trivy_ignorefile prefers .trivyignore.yaml over the classic .trivyignore and returns None when neither exists
the repo-root .trivyignore.yaml suppresses CVE-2026-54285 scoped to the perf package-lock, so the OTel medium no longer reports (and no other finding is suppressed)
behaviors.evidence: Verified in this PR's security.yml CI (real Trivy with --ignorefile active): @opentelemetry/core CVE-2026-54285 suppressed, medium count 1 -> 0, high/critical still 0. Trivy not installed locally (Windows dev box) so this is a CI-gated check confirmed before merge; YAML schema validated locally (id/paths/expired_at/statement parse).
